audience_policies.source_phrase: Admits 6 people at $9.00 per Adult and $6.00 per Child. Under age 2 is free. Valid for general daytime admission to Franklin Park Zoo or Stone Zoo only. Not valid for Boston Lights or ZooLights . No reservation required.
